emergencyCallExamples.initialDescription: My father has severe chest pain, having difficulty breathing, he is 65 years old. Please send an ambulance immediately!

transcript.content: Help! My father is having chest pain and can't breathe properly
Okay, stay calm. What is his age?
He is 65 years old. Please send ambulance fast!
We are sending an ambulance. Has he taken any medication?
Yes, he takes heart medicine but I think it's not working

emergencyCallExamples.initialDescription: There has been a car collision near Bandra Kurla Complex. Two vehicles involved, multiple people injured. One person unconscious.

transcript.content: There is an accident! Car collision near BKC, people are hurt!
How many people are injured?
I see... three or four people, one is unconscious!
Is anyone bleeding?
Yes, one person has heavy bleeding from the head
Stay back from traffic. Ambulance and police are coming

emergencyCallExamples.initialDescription: Fire outbreak in residential building at Dadar. Smoke visible, people need to evacuate. Some people are trapped on upper floors.

transcript.content: There is fire in the building! Smoke everywhere!
Are you safe? Where are you calling from?
I am outside. People are still on the 4th and 5th floors. Can't evacuate!
Fire brigade is on the way. Tell people to go to balcony or window

emergencyCallExamples.initialDescription: Witnessing suspicious activity - looks like a robbery in progress at the jewelry store. Suspect is armed. Please send police immediately.

transcript.content: There is a robbery happening! In the jewelry store near CST!
Are you in a safe location?
Yes, I am across the street. There is a man with a gun threatening the shopkeeper
Stay where you are. Police are coming. Can you describe the suspect?
Male, around 30, wearing black shirt, has a gun

extractedInfo.suspectDescription: Male, ~30 years old, black shirt, armed with gun

emergencyCallExamples.initialDescription: Severe allergic reaction - person is having trouble breathing and severe swelling on face. Medical condition is deteriorating.

transcript.content: My wife is having an allergic reaction! Her face is swelling, she can't breathe!
What caused the allergy?
We are not sure, maybe something she ate. She has history of allergies
Is she conscious?
Yes but panicking. Please send ambulance fast!

extractedInfo.condition: Anaphylaxis symptoms - facial swelling, difficulty breathing

emergencyCallExamples.initialDescription: Gas leak detected in residential building. Strange smell, residents feeling dizzy. Possible chemical hazard.

transcript.content: There is gas leak in our building! Strange smell, people feeling dizzy!
How many people are affected?
About 20-30 people in the building. Some have headaches
Evacuate immediately. Go outside. HAZMAT team is coming

callTranscriptExample.fullTranscript:
User: Help! My father is having chest pain and can't breathe properly!
Operator: Okay, stay calm. I'm connecting you to emergency services. What is his age?
User: He is 65 years old. Please send ambulance fast!
Operator: We are sending an ambulance right away. Has he taken any medication recently?
User: Yes, he takes heart medicine but I think it's not working.
Operator: That's helpful information. The ambulance will arrive in about 8 minutes. Keep him sitting and try to keep him calm.
User: Okay, we will do that. Please hurry!
Operator: Help is on the way. Stay with your father and keep the line open.
